name: GLOME Holdings,Inc.
summary: GLOME Holdings,Inc. engages in the real estate business. The company provides medical operation consolidation; visiting nursing station operation; and medical staff recruitment and medical tourism services. It also offers property management services; renovates medical facilities; and develops related facilities, as well as hospital management support services. In addition, the company is involved in the sale and leaseback of hospital real estate. The company was formerly known as LC Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to GLOME Holdings,Inc. in October 2019. GLOME Holdings,Inc. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
